docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY CHANG, CALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT HOPFNER, CHRISTOPHER ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $200.00 SERVED MAR-23-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOPFNER, CHRISTOPHER ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CALVIN CHANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER ROBERT HOPFNER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.
STIPULATION TO USE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY CHANG, CALVIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG, CALVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOPFNER, CHRISTOPHER ROBERT $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, CALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT HOPFNER, CHRISTOPHER ROBERT
